headline: Trump's Iran Nuke Party 🚀💥 BLOCKED by House Cucks 😩📛!
text:
US House GOON SQUAD 🏛️🤡 just SWERVED HARD 😵‍💫 on Demmie simps' 🐶📜 WAR POWERS WANKFEST – measure to COCKBLOCK 🍆🚫 Trump Daddy 🍊👑 from SLAYING Iran 💣🇮🇷 got REKT 💀 by ONE VOTE 213-214 😱‼️ Symbolic AF like a participation trophy 🏆😂 but these Dem cucks 😭💦 thought they could leash the ORANGE BEAST 🦁🔥! Senate already YEETED 🚮 a twin reso yesterday 47-52 🚫📉, party-line BEEF 🥊 like MAGA vs Blue Wave ORGY 💦👯‍♂️ gone wrong!

GOP CHADS 🐸💪 mostly NOPE'd the bill cuz Trump's like 'War's WRAPPED 🎁😏 CLOSE TO OVER' – shifting timelines slicker than Epstein's flight log ✈️🛌! But if Iran glow-up turns to WW3 🍄💥 or drags past 60-day DADDY LAW ⏰⚖️ (shoutout 1973 Nixon Vietnam VIBE CHECK 📜🇻🇳), some R's might FLIP like pancakes 🥞🔄! Kentucky's THOMAS MASSIE 🧔🇺🇸 lone GOP BRO 💯 sided with Dems, Maine's JARED GOLDEN 🍑 lone Dem TRAITOR voted NAY 😈, Ohio's WARREN DAVIDSON 🥱 'present' like ghosting a Tinder date 👻📱!

NY Dem GREGORY MEEKS 💅📢, reso DADDY who DROPPED it, spilling tea ☕ post-vote: 'Gonna LOBBY 👋 Golden simps & PUSH ANOTHER 📜 to FLEX Congress MUSCLES 💪 over Trump's Iran THIRST TRAP 🔥🇮🇷!' Last month? Similar flop with 2 GOP yes-men & 4 Dem no-shows 😩 – uphill to Senate slaughterhouse 🏛️🔪 then Trump VETO NUCLEAR 💣📛! US-Israel strikes KICKED OFF Feb 28 🗓️🚀, clock TICKING ⏳ like bomb under War Powers Reso from Nixon ERA 🕰️🦹‍♂️!

Trump's IRAN BEEF 🥩💥 got lawmakers SWEATING 😰💦 – Dems SIMPING for PEACE 🕊️📜 while GOP like 'LET ORANGE MAN COOK 🍳🔥!' Massie solo hero 🦸‍♂️ or cuck? Golden the ZAGGER 😏? Meeks plotting ROUND 2 🥊📈 – Congress vs Prez DICK-MEASURING CONTEST 🍆📏 in full swing, will war END or EXTEND like bad Netflix binge 📺😵‍💫?! MAGA MOONING 📈🍑, Dems RAGING 💥😡 – STAY TUNED bbs 👀‼️
